'''鈭歴h-zh-n''' ('''kashazhan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:peach|peach]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-zh-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:peach|peach]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴h-zh-n
|-
! Lemma
| kashazhan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishazhan|thishazhan]] || [[word:jishazhan|jishazhan]] || [[word:shishazhan|shishazhan]] || [[word:kishazhan|kishazhan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushazhan|thuthushazhan]] || [[word:jujushazhan|jujushazhan]] || [[word:shushushazhan|shushushazhan]] || [[word:kukushazhan|kukushazhan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushazhan|thushazhan]] || [[word:jushazhan|jushazhan]] || [[word:shushazhan|shushazhan]] || [[word:kushazhan|kushazhan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushazhan|thushazhan]] || [[word:jushazhan|jushazhan]] || [[word:shushazhan|shushazhan]] || [[word:kushazhan|kushazhan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshazhan|theshazhan]] || [[word:jeshazhan|jeshazhan]] || [[word:sheshazhan|sheshazhan]] || [[word:keshazhan|keshazhan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshazhan|thothoshazhan]] || [[word:jojoshazhan|jojoshazhan]] || [[word:shoshoshazhan|shoshoshazhan]] || [[word:kokoshazhan|kokoshazhan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshazhan|thoshazhan]] || [[word:joshazhan|joshazhan]] || [[word:shoshazhan|shoshazhan]] || [[word:koshazhan|koshazhan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshazhan|thoshazhan]] || [[word:joshazhan|joshazhan]] || [[word:shoshazhan|shoshazhan]] || [[word:koshazhan|koshazhan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:shazhan|shazhan]] || [[word:shazhan|shazhan]] || [[word:shazhan|shazhan]] || [[word:shazhan|shazhan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:shazhan|shazhan]] || [[word:shazhan|shazhan]] || [[word:shazhan|shazhan]] || [[word:shazhan|shazhan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:shazhan|shazhan]] || [[word:shazhan|shazhan]] || [[word:shazhan|shazhan]] || [[word:shazhan|shazhan]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:shazhan|shazhan]] || [[word:shazhan|shazhan]] || [[word:shazhan|shazhan]] || [[word:shazhan|shazhan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙shazhan|th忙shazhan]] || [[word:j忙shazhan|j忙shazhan]] || [[word:sh忙shazhan|sh忙shazhan]] || [[word:k忙shazhan|k忙shazhan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashazhan|thathashazhan]] || [[word:jajashazhan|jajashazhan]] || [[word:shashashazhan|shashashazhan]] || [[word:kakashazhan|kakashazhan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashazhan|thashazhan]] || [[word:jashazhan|jashazhan]] || [[word:shashazhan|shashazhan]] || [[word:kashazhan|kashazhan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashazhan|thashazhan]] || [[word:jashazhan|jashazhan]] || [[word:shashazhan|shashazhan]] || [[word:kashazhan|kashazhan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shashazhan|shashazhan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshashazhan|goshashazhan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishashazhan|gokishashazhan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shashazhann眉|shashazhann眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshashazhannkn眉|goshashazhannkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishashazhann眉|gokishashazhann眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shashazhansh毛|shashazhansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshashazhannksh毛|goshashazhannksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishashazhansh毛|gokishashazhansh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashazhanro|shashazhanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashazhannkro|goshashazhannkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashazhanro|gokishashazhanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shashazhanmu|shashazhanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashazhannkmu|goshashazhannkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashazhanmu|gokishashazhanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shashazhansher|shashazhansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshashazhannksher|goshashazhannksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishashazhansher|gokishashazhansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shashazhanng|shashazhanng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshashazhannkng|goshashazhannkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishashazhanng|gokishashazhanng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shashazhanya|shashazhanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashazhannkya|goshashazhannkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishashazhanya|gokishashazhanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shashazhanyam|shashazhanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshashazhannkyam|goshashazhannkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishashazhanyam|gokishashazhanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashazhann眉sh毛|shashazhann眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashazhannkn眉sh毛|goshashazhannkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashazhann眉sh毛|gokishashazhann眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashazhann眉ro|shashazhann眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashazhannkn眉ro|goshashazhannkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashazhann眉ro|gokishashazhann眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashazhann眉mu|shashazhann眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashazhannkn眉mu|goshashazhannkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashazhann眉mu|gokishashazhann眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashazhansh毛n眉|shashazhansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashazhannksh毛n眉|goshashazhannksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashazhansh毛n眉|gokishashazhansh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashazhansh毛ro|shashazhansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashazhannksh毛ro|goshashazhannksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashazhansh毛ro|gokishashazhansh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashazhansh毛mu|shashazhansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashazhannksh毛mu|goshashazhannksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashazhansh毛mu|gokishashazhansh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashazhanron眉|shashazhanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashazhannkron眉|goshashazhannkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashazhanron眉|gokishashazhanron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashazhanrosh毛|shashazhanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashazhannkrosh毛|goshashazhannkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashazhanrosh毛|gokishashazhanrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashazhanromu|shashazhanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashazhannkromu|goshashazhannkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashazhanromu|gokishashazhanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashazhanmun眉|shashazhanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashazhannkmun眉|goshashazhannkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashazhanmun眉|gokishashazhanmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashazhanmush毛|shashazhanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashazhannkmush毛|goshashazhannkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashazhanmush毛|gokishashazhanmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashazhanmuro|shashazhanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashazhannkmuro|goshashazhannkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashazhanmuro|gokishashazhanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
